case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A VS. BRENDA J. CHENEY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-04-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHENEY, BRENDA J. $19,532.83 PRINCIPAL, $432.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,965.33, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A SERVED AUG-27-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHENEY, BRENDA J.
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS (CCP 1033) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A AS TO DEFENDANT CHENEY, BRENDA J.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $432.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CHENEY, BRENDA J.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-04-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A AS TO DEFENDANT CHENEY, BRENDA J. DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012
